title: Game of Darts Guide
seoTitle: Game of Darts Guide | BarkinMad Studios
description: Complete Game of Darts guide covering setup, score entry, modes, match types, DartBot, statistics, leaderboards, achievements, and settings.
summary: A compact start-to-finish guide for Game of Darts using the Website Framework v1.1 documentation structure.
sourceNotes: Compiled from the Game of Darts documentation pages created in this rollout.
The guide intentionally avoids unsupported claims for development-only or placeholder modes.

sections.heading: Start here
paragraphs: Game of Darts is for tracking darts sessions, scores, players, and progression across supported local modes.
Begin with Getting Started, then read Score Entry & Controls, Game Modes, and Match Types before moving into DartBot, statistics, leaderboards, achievements, caller voices, and settings.

sections.heading: Core guide path
paragraphs: For a normal session, create or select players, choose a mode, configure options, finish the match cleanly, and then review stats and Game Center surfaces where supported.
For solo Match play, check DartBot access and the DartBot level setting before starting.
bullets: Setup: players, mode, options, and Game Center sign-in
Play: score entry, hit/miss input, checkout or mode-specific rules
Review: player stats, leaderboards, achievements, and saved sessions
Access: Pro, DartBot-only unlock, 48-hour unlock, and ad-supported flow

sections.heading: Remaining gaps
paragraphs: The implementation is structurally complete. Remaining work is mainly content polish, current screenshots for each page, and final verification of To Verify details in the central Game of Darts docs.
Framework limitations found during this rollout are recorded as v1.2 candidates rather than changing the frozen v1.1 framework.

images.alt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts documentation images
images.caption: Shared placeholder used for pages without dedicated artwork
